channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Independent Commission for Infrastructure submits flood control investigation documents to DOJ
item.description: The Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) officially handed over documents detailing its investigation into alleged irregularities in flood control projects to the Department of Justice (DOJ...

item.title: Congressional Black Caucus Criticizes Pritzker Over Illinois Senate Primary Support
item.description: Illinois Governor JB Pritzker faces backlash from Congressional Black Caucus (CBC) members following the Democratic primary for the state's open Senate seat. Pritzker provided significant financial su...

item.title: Gold and Silver Prices Hit 4-Month Low Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: Gold and silver prices in India have dropped to a four-month low, as geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran continue to affect global markets. Despite the ongoing conflict, gold prices in India...

item.title: Malacañang urges Rep. Tiangco to avoid baseless remarks on VP Duterte and flood control issue
item.description: Malacañang has criticized Navotas Representative Toby Tiangco for his recent statement suggesting that Vice President Sara Duterte would hold those responsible for alleged anomalies in flood control p...

item.title: Gospel Artist Mary Clare in Critical Condition After Acid Attack Linked to Ex-Boyfriend
item.description: A 24-year-old gospel musician, Mary Clare, is fighting for her life at Kenyatta National Hospital after she was attacked with acid along Ngong Road, Nairobi. Clare, a member of the Redemption Minister...

item.title: Tanzania's Maritime Investments Boost Regional Trade and Connectivity
item.description: Tanzania has made significant progress in its transport sector, particularly in maritime services, aiming to enhance national economic growth and regional connectivity. Key developments include the la...

item.title: Ruto and Opposition Compete for Influence Over Kenya's 6.3 Million Gen Z Voters
item.description: President William Ruto and the opposition are locked in a fierce competition to win the support of Kenya's 6.3 million Gen Z voters ahead of the 2027 elections. This young demographic, mostly aged 18 ...

item.title: Heatwave Alert Issued for Northern and Western Cape in South Africa
item.description: South Africa's Northern and Western Cape provinces are bracing for hot and uncomfortable conditions as the South African Weather Service has issued a heatwave advisory. The temperatures are expected t...

item.title: Trump's Counterterrorism Director Resigns, Citing Unfounded Justification for War on Iran
item.description: Joe Kent, Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, resigned in protest over the U.S. military action against Iran, asserting that Iran posed no immediate threat to the United States. Kent cri...

item.title: Kenya Sends Foreign Minister to Russia to Address Recruitment of Kenyans for Ukraine Conflict and Seek Repatriation
item.description: Kenya's Foreign Minister, Musalia Mudavadi, travelled to Moscow on Sunday, March 16, 2026, for urgent talks with Russian officials, including Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov. The main goal was to stop ...

item.title: The Tragic Sinking of HMCS Otter and the Heroic Rescue of Survivors in Halifax Harbour
item.description: On March 26, 1941, just outside Halifax Harbour, the HMCS Otter, a vessel patrolling for German U-boats and sea mines, caught fire and sank, claiming the lives of 19 crew members. The ship’s remaining...

item.title: Kenya to Repatriate Citizens Who Joined Russian Army After Recruitment Ban Agreement
item.description: The Kenyan government has announced an amnesty for Kenyan citizens who joined Russia’s military operations in Ukraine, following an agreement with Moscow to halt all recruitment of Kenyan nationals. P...

item.title: Understanding the fear of showing effort and ambition
item.description: For many people, showing effort openly dey feel risky because e expose us to judgement from others. People dey fear say if dem try and fail, everyone go see am, and even if dem succeed, e fit bring en...

item.title: Meta shuts down Horizon Worlds as the Metaverse dream fades
item.description: The article by Charlie Lewis, published in Crikey on 23 March 2026, examines the quiet downfall of Mark Zuckerberg’s once-celebrated Metaverse project. Meta has announced that it will effectively clos...

item.title: Crews working to restore infrastructure after mudslides in Metro Vancouver as another storm looms
item.description: After heavy rainfall and mudslides in Metro Vancouver, local crews are racing to clear debris and protect vital water infrastructure. A recent mudslide near Coquitlam blocked Pipeline Road, a key acce...

item.title: Overview of Pound to Naira Exchange Rate and Market Trends on March 23, 2026
item.description: Today, March 23, 2026, the British Pound dey maintain strong position against the Nigerian Naira. For the official Nigerian Foreign Exchange Market (NFEM), the Pound start the day for ₦1,807.88 and by...

item.title: Potential Market Volatility Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: Investors are closely watching developments in the Middle East as tensions between the United States and Iran escalate. Reports indicate that Donald Trump has threatened to target Iranian power plants...

item.title: Indian Rupee Drops to Record Low Amid Middle East Conflict and Energy Fears
item.description: The Indian rupee has fallen to a new record low of 93.84 against the US Dollar as the ongoing conflict in the Middle East continues to threaten global energy supplies. The rupee has weakened by nearly...

item.title: Sarah Ferguson Faces Housing Struggles Amid Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor Scandal
item.description: Sarah Ferguson, the former Duchess of York, is currently facing a challenging living situation, with her return to the UK appearing increasingly difficult due to personal scandals surrounding her ex-h...

item.title: ANC’s New BEE Fund: Acknowledging Failures and the Debate for Inclusive Growth
item.description: South Africa is currently facing a stark choice in how to drive inclusive economic growth. The ANC has proposed tightening B-BBEE policies, focusing on a state-run Transformation Fund that channels re...
